---
title: "Started My Postdoctoral Journey"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# Started My Postdoctoral Journey

## July 2026

![](images/postdoc1.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

*Photo coming soon.*

***

Information about my move to the **University of Mississippi**, my new research on **plant–microbiome interactions**, and the beginning of my postdoctoral journey will be added soon!

***

Stay tuned!
